ddls:
CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "city_from" TEXT /* City where the route starts */,
  "city_to" TEXT /* City where the route ends */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for claiming the route */,
  "card_colors" TEXT /* Colors of cards required to claim the route */,
  "card_image" TEXT /* Path to the image associated with the route */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the route */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the route */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_card_colors FOREIGN KEY ("card_colors") REFERENCES card_colors ("color_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_city_to FOREIGN KEY ("city_to") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_city_from FOREIGN KEY ("city_from") REFERENCES cities ("city_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the city is located in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the card color */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the card color */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the card color was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the card color was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the game */,
  "display_name" TEXT /* Display name of the user */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile image */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_cards" (
  "user_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user card entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the cards */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card color */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of cards of the specified color owned by the user */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's card quantity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_cards_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES card_colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_cards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_routes" (
  "user_route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user route entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who claimed the route */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route claimed by the user */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the route was claimed */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the user for claiming the route */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's route claim was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_routes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_routes_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user on the leaderboard */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the user */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user on the leaderboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for earning the achievement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the achievement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the achievement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_achievements" (
  "user_achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user achievement entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the achievement */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the achievement earned by the user */,
  "earned_date" TEXT /* Date the achievement was earned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user achievement entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user achievement entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_achievements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_achievements_achievement_id FOREIGN KEY ("achievement_id") REFERENCES achievements ("achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card trade */,
  "sender_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the cards */,
  "receiver_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the cards */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card color traded */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of cards traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the card trade entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the card trade entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_trades_receiver_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_trades_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES card_colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_trades_sender_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
